# Polk County Golf Carts

> Serving our community as a family owned business since 2020 in Livingston, Texas. Authorized Breezy EV golf cart dealer for East Texas — sales, service, custom builds, and rentals.

## About
- Founded 2020 · Family-owned · BBB Accredited
- Address: 1732 FM 3277, Livingston, TX 77351
- Phone: 936-223-1182 (alt 936-566-5069)
- Email: polkcountygolfcarts@yahoo.com
- Hours: Tue-Fri 9a-4p, Saturday 9a-2p, Closed Sun-Mon and holidays
- Service area: San Jacinto, Polk, Walker, Trinity & Angelina counties — free pickup & delivery within 25 miles, extended up to 75 miles for a flat $75

## What we sell
We sell brand-new Breezy EV carts, refurbished carts, and used carts — electric and gas.

### Breezy EV models we stock
- [Breeze 4](https://polkcountygolfcarts.com/breezy-ev/breeze-4/) — 4-seater, street, 45–55 mi range, from $11,995
- [Breeze 4L](https://polkcountygolfcarts.com/breezy-ev/breeze-4l/) — 4-seater, lifted, 35–50 mi range, from $13,495
- [Breeze 6L](https://polkcountygolfcarts.com/breezy-ev/breeze-6l/) — 6-seater, lifted, 45–55 mi range, from $15,495
- [Terrain 6](https://polkcountygolfcarts.com/breezy-ev/terrain-6/) — 6-seater, lifted, 35–50 mi range, from $16,995

## Services
- 20-Point Inspection (Full Service Package) from $165
- Battery service (lead-acid and Lithium — Bolt Energy + White Lightening)
- Custom paint, lift kits, wheels & tires, sound systems, rear flip seats
- Controller and motor upgrades (Navitas + White Lightening)
- 10% off Parts & Labor — valid 1 year from initial service

## Financing
- Lendmark Financial
- Dealer Direct
